skip_reason: Relies on 'window.__INITIAL_STATE__.$_closet.listingsPostData.data' (per-listing 'status_changed_at' timestamps) being populated, and on '.tiles_container > div[data-et-prop-listing_id]' tile elements matching those listing IDs being rendered. This data shape is specific to a closet page that has active listings loaded client-side, and the exact closet/listing URL isn't guaranteed to remain stable or populated the same way over time.
notes: Passive - reads listing 'status_changed_at' dates from window.__INITIAL_STATE__.$_closet.listingsPostData.data and appends a 'Date Changed: <date>' div to each matching listing tile's '.card' element. No modal is shown; if no data/listings are found it shows an alert() instead.
